title: Remapped
description: Reworked maps, featuring better map colors and cheaper maps!
body:
# Remapped

Remapped is a mod that aims to improve the vanilla map system.

## Description

> v2 is HERE for 1.21.11 and above! This version is now **safe to move existing worlds on/off of**: Maps will continue to store and display their vanilla colors. This version is also more compatible with other mods such as Not Enough Animations.

Currently, Remapped implements two features to help improve the map experience.

### 1: Better Map Colors

Remapped overhauls the map color system to bring more accurate colors to maps. This is done in a data-driven system where datapacks can define new colors and can assign blocks/biomes to them.

**As a result of this system, modded blocks will not show up on the map.**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MqALL8pc/images/8ddb80fe0581adf8ca4df0c7f4f7ac5416e291c8.png)

### 2: Cheaper Maps

To help make getting maps easier, Remapped adds a cheaper map recipe that requires an ink sac instead of a compass. These cheaper maps will not have player trackers on them. 

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MqALL8pc/images/452fa6da181593b3a8e27ddac8d1e55ae8a107ad.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MqALL8pc/images/da5ac732e8e670ce97a9a0d2886dd02141d8777c.png)
